baseline.reason: Output contains only a literal bash command with no vulnerability analysis whatsoever.

vastdb.reason: Identifies the vulnerable loop in filter_slice but mischaracterizes the bug as an off-by-one error. Misses both the negative-index root cause (FFMAX guards prevent negative block_pos_right when block_size > dimensions) and the under-allocation fix (FFALIGN on num/den alloc). Contains irrelevant speculation about block_matching being unimplemented.
